home.title: Sign in to your storefront
home.description: The browser now owns login, logout, route protection, token refresh, and API bearer token flow.
home.oauthSummary: The identity provider handles login and logout redirects.
home.routeSummary: Signed-in routes are protected on the frontend.
home.apiSummary: API calls send the access token automatically.

account.title: Your account
account.description: This page reads the authenticated user state and exposes the active roles and token preview.
account.tokenLabel: Short preview of the current bearer token

seller.title: Seller workspace
seller.description: Only users with the seller role can keep moving through this route.
seller.accessSummary: This screen is guarded before rendering.

admin.title: Admin workspace
admin.description: Only users with the admin role can open this area.
admin.accessSummary: Guarded with the same frontend flow.

forbidden.title: You do not have access
forbidden.description: Your session is valid, but the current user does not have the role required for this page.
forbidden.tip: Check the assigned roles in the identity provider and try again.
